rulings.Case Title: THOMPSON PACIFIC CONSTRUCTION, INC. VS. SAN MATEO UNION HIGH SCHOOL DISTRICT et al
rulings.Rulings: DEFENDANT SAN MATEO UNION HIGH SCHOOL DISTRICT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION -- Grant motion for summary judgment: 1. plaintiff's bid was non-responsive and contract was not formal; 2. The conditional bid acceptance permitted, see the Taylor case; 3. no estoppel claim - reliance unreasonable, in view of bid being non-responsive, also see Universal By-Product Inc. case. (302/REQ/PB)
